name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Ryker gains +[Arg3]% Crit. Rate and +[Arg4]% Black Sigil Yield. If at least 400 Black Sigils have been obtained through battle, upgrade 1 {Chaotic Legacy} at the start of next battle.
